subject: Re: Viceland
body:
Thank you Marty,

The questions we wanted to reach out to Mr Epstein for comment are listed below. Feel free to contact me on ████████████████████ after reviewing. Kind regards - Matt

A former employee has told us that Donald Trump attended Mr Epstein's Palm Beach estate on at least two occasions. Does Mr Epstein recall hosting Donald Trump at that residence?

On one such occasion, it has been suggested to us that Mr Epstein and Donald Trump watched "young girls try on bikinis" while making comments on the their bodies." Does Mr Epstein have any comment?

How does Mr Epstein respond to claims that women - some under the legal age of sexual consent - were used as "sex slaves" at his properties?

A former employee of Mr Epstein has alleged to us that Mr Epstein sexually assaulted her on numerous occasions. Does Mr Epstein have a comment?

Did or does Mr Epstein have cameras inside rooms at his Palm Beach residence?

Did Mr Epstein remove those cameras before police raided the property as part of the investigation into alleged crimes? Did Mr Epstein ever hand over any recordings from any cameras at his properties to the authorities as part of his non-prosecution agreement?

Does Mr Epstein have in his possession any video recordings of Donald Trump taken from inside his Palm Beach estate or any other residence?

Did Mr Epstein hold sex parties at his residences involving girls under the age of sexual consent? Was Donald Trump ever present at any of these parties?

Has Mr Epstein upheld the conditions of his sentencing and registered as a sex offender in all jurisdictions in which he is due to do so?

Does Mr Epstein have any comment regarding allegations made by a woman named in the media as █████████████████████ relating to her being sexually abused by Mr Epstein or used as a "sex slave"?

ENDS

ENDS

subject: Re: Viceland
body: If you still want, send the questions. I would talk with you off the record after reviewing them (reserving the right at my option to make an on the record statement), hope that works for you. Marty
body_html: If you still want, send the questions. I would talk with you off the record after reviewing them (reserving the right at my option to make an on the record statement), hope that works for you. Marty

subject: Re: Viceland
body:
Hello Martin,

Thank you for getting back to me. We would be looking for on record comments or a "no comment" to our questions. But I am certainly happy to have an off record conversation with yourself as well. Perhaps we could set up a time to chat briefly off record on Monday before I send you our questions for Mr Epstein?

Kind regards,
Matt

subject: Re: Viceland
body:
